summary: Completed comprehensive testing of ZVG-Portal Termin-Extraktor app. Backend APIs working well (93.3% success rate) with minor settings initialization issue. Frontend fully functional with excellent UI/UX, proper German localization, and seamless backend integration. All major features tested successfully including dashboard statistics, data fetching, filtering, navigation, and detail views.

flaky_endpoints.issue: Returns 500 error on first access when no settings exist (MongoDB ObjectId serialization issue)
flaky_endpoints.impact: Settings dialog may fail to load initially, but works after first update
flaky_endpoints.workaround: Settings work correctly after first PUT request initializes the document

integration_issues.issue: Minor timeout when clicking to close notifications dropdown

passed_tests: Dashboard loads with 4 statistics cards (Total: 35, Wohnhäuser: 11, Wohnungen: 14, Grundstücke: 5)
'Daten abrufen' button successfully fetches new foreclosures (added 12 demo entries)
Filter bar allows filtering by Bundesland, Klassifizierung, Objekttyp - all working
Clicking table rows opens foreclosure detail sheet with complete information
Navigation between Dashboard, Alle Termine, Klassifizierung views working perfectly
Settings dialog opens and shows Bundesländer selection options
Notifications dropdown shows notifications with unread indicator
Classification rules view displays 6 rules with proper German object type mappings
Backend API /api/foreclosures returns 35 foreclosures with proper filtering
Backend API /api/statistics returns correct breakdown by classification and state
Backend API /api/fetch successfully triggers data collection (demo data generation)
Settings update functionality working after initialization
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix MongoDB ObjectId serialization issue in settings endpoint - ensure settings document is properly initialized on first access to prevent 500 error

success_percentage.frontend: 95% (all major functionality working, minor timeout issue)
